window_summary: This window tracks the recent 2dust/v2rayNG release stream from version 2.0.1 through 2.2.3, covering Hysteria2 refactoring, xray core updates, TLS configuration changes, new features like strategy groups and WebDAV backup, and eventual deprecation of allowInsecure.

Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.0.1
Tag: 2.0.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-01-15T07:02:00Z; created_at: 2026-01-15T06:51:11Z
Release notes:
### 本次更新
- 重构 Hysteria2 ，使用 xray core ，并移除插件版本
- 修复发现的问题 https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/discussions/5157

https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/releases/tag/2.0.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.0.1, the Hysteria2 implementation was refactored to use xray core, and the plugin version was removed. Additionally, issues reported in discussion #5157 were fixed.

Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.0.8
Tag: 2.0.8; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-02-06T12:14:37Z; created_at: 2026-02-06T12:08:17Z
Release notes:
### 本次更新
- 修复发现的问题 https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/discussions/5157
* 跟进 xray 配置，  [xray-core  v26.2.6 ](https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.2.6)；如果你不需要更新 core ，那么你可以先暂时不要升级此版本
### 特别注意
* xray core TLS 将移除了 allowInsecure 配置项，请使用 pinnedPeerCertSha256 代替，且支持分享，日志中会有明显提示
### 2.0.0 版本详细更新内容
https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/releases/tag/2.0.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.0.8, issues reported in discussion #5157 were fixed. The xray configuration was updated to follow xray-core v26.2.6. A special note warns that xray core TLS will remove the allowInsecure configuration option; users should use pinnedPeerCertSha256 instead, which supports sharing, and the logs will provide clear prompts.

* 跟进 xray 配置，  [xray-core  v26.2.6 ](https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.2.6)；如果你不需要更新 core ，那么你可以先暂时不要升级此版本
* 添加默认分组，增加启用所有组 设置（默认不启用）

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.0.11, issues reported in discussion #5157 were fixed. The xray configuration was updated to follow xray-core v26.2.6. A default group was added, and a setting to enable all groups was introduced (disabled by default). A special note warns that xray core TLS will remove the allowInsecure configuration option; users should use pinnedPeerCertSha256 instead, which supports sharing, and the logs will provide clear prompts.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.0.13
Tag: 2.0.13; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-03T08:19:49Z; created_at: 2026-03-03T08:11:10Z
Release notes:
# v2.0.x 更新说明
## 📦 系统要求变更
- **最低 Android 版本提升至7.0** (原为5.0)
- 目标 Android 版本更新至 Android 16
## 🎉 新增功能
- **Material Design 3适配** - 界面更符合最新设计规范
- **策略组功能** - 全新的服务器分组管理方式，支持智能选择最优服务器(最小延迟/最小负载/随机/轮询)
- **WebDAV远程备份** - 支持将配置备份到WebDAV服务器，实现多设备同步
- **全新分组界面** - 主界面改为标签页设计，可按订阅分组查看服务器；增加启用所有组 设置
- **独立备份管理界面** - 新增专门的备份与恢复管理页面
- **Xray 原生 TUN 支持** - 使用Xray内置TUN功能 [v26.2.6](https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.2.6)
- **移除 badvpn-tun2socks** - 简化VPN核心组件
## 🔧 功能改进
- **批量测速加速** - 多个服务器同时测速，大幅提升测试效率
- **测试进度显示** - 测速时显示实时进度通知
- **自动清理无效配置** - 测速后可自动删除无法连接的服务器
- **自动排序** - 测速后可自动按延迟排序服务器列表
- **ECH支持** - 新增Encrypted Client Hello配置选项
- **优化夜间模式** - 改进深色主题配色方案
- **订阅显示最后更新时间** - 方便查看订阅更新状态
- 重构 Hysteria2 ，使用 xray core ，并移除插件版本
- 增加 tls 证书指纹
- 优化订阅更新后的提示信息
## ⚠️ 重要提示
- 此版本为大版本更新，建议更新前备份配置
* xray core TLS 将移除了 allowInsecure 配置项，请使用 pinnedPeerCertSha256 代替，且支持分享
---
[2.0.0 问题讨论](https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/discussions/5157)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.0.13, the minimum Android version was raised to 7.0 and the target Android version updated to Android 16. New features include Material Design 3 adaptation, strategy group functionality with smart server selection (minimum latency, minimum load, random, round-robin), WebDAV remote backup, a new tabbed main interface for grouping by subscription, an independent backup management interface, Xray native TUN support (v26.2.6), and removal of badvpn-tun2socks. Improvements include accelerated batch speed tests, real-time progress display during speed tests, automatic cleanup of invalid configurations after speed tests, automatic sorting by latency after speed tests, ECH support, optimized dark mode, display of last subscription update time, refactored Hysteria2 using xray core with plugin version removed, TLS certificate fingerprint addition, and optimized subscription update notification. Important notes: this is a major version update, backup is recommended before updating; xray core TLS will remove allowInsecure, use pinnedPeerCertSha256 instead, which supports sharing.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.0.14
Tag: 2.0.14; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-03-10T11:38:53Z; created_at: 2026-03-10T11:22:50Z
Release notes:
### 本次更新
* 修复发现的问题 https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/discussions/5157
* 当路由规则中出现 geoip:cn 和 geoip:private 时，加载 geoip-only-cn-private.dat 以减少内存使用量。
* 改进默认分组的保留逻辑，当有其他订阅分组时可以删除默认分组
### 2.0.x 版本详细更新内容
https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/releases/tag/2.0.13
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.0.14, issues reported in discussion #5157 were fixed. When routing rules contain geoip:cn and geoip:private, geoip-only-cn-private.dat is loaded to reduce memory usage. The default group retention logic was improved so that the default group can be deleted when other subscription groups exist.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.1.0
Tag: 2.1.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-17T07:24:47Z; created_at: 2026-04-17T07:16:53Z
Release notes:
### 本次更新
1. 添加本地 SOCKS 用户名/密码支持
2. 添加动态本地 SOCKS 端口选项
3. 添加基于进程 (包名) 的路由支持，仅在使用 Xray 的 TUN、开启 routeOnly 且 Android 10+ 时可用
4.  添加支持路由中的出站可选别名，即支持分流到不同的服务器，请使用 Xray 的 TUN
5. 添加启动器快捷方式以启动/停止服务
6. 添加启用 IPv6 选项，区别 IPv6  优先
7. https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.4.15
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.1.0, local SOCKS username/password support was added. A dynamic local SOCKS port option was added. Process-based (package name) routing support was added, available only when using Xray TUN with routeOnly enabled on Android 10+. Outbound alias support in routing was added, enabling traffic splitting to different servers when using Xray TUN. A launcher shortcut to start/stop the service was added. An enable IPv6 option was added, distinct from IPv6 priority. The xray-core version was updated to v26.4.15.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.1.2, local SOCKS username/password support was added. A dynamic local SOCKS port option was added. Process-based (package name) routing support was added, available only when using Xray TUN with routeOnly enabled on Android 10+. Outbound alias support in routing was added, enabling traffic splitting to different servers when using Xray TUN. A launcher shortcut to start/stop the service was added. An enable IPv6 option was added, distinct from IPv6 priority. The xray-core version was updated to v26.4.17. Visual package name selection for routing was added. Some issues were fixed.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.1.3
Tag: 2.1.3; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-26T03:28:36Z; created_at: 2026-04-26T03:23:14Z
Release notes:
### 本次更新
- 添加本地 SOCKS 用户名/密码支持
- 添加动态本地 SOCKS 端口选项
- 添加基于进程 (包名) 的路由支持，仅在使用 Xray 的 TUN、开启 routeOnly 且 Android 10+ 时可用
- 添加支持路由中的出站可选别名，即支持分流到不同的服务器，请使用 Xray 的 TUN
- 添加启动器快捷方式以启动/停止服务
- 添加启用 IPv6 选项，区别 IPv6  优先
- 增加路由包名可视化选择
- 修复了一些问题
- 添加 KCP  MTU and TTI  https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/pull/5539
- 添加关闭本地代理或关闭 SOCKS5 中的 UDP 功能的选项  https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/pull/5548
- https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.4.25
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.1.3, local SOCKS username/password support was added. A dynamic local SOCKS port option was added. Tag: 2.1.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-19T09:02:27Z; created_at: 2026-05-19T08:56:12Z
Release notes:
### 本次更新
- 添加本地 SOCKS 用户名/密码支持
- 添加动态本地 SOCKS 端口选项
- 添加基于进程 (包名) 的路由支持，仅在使用 Xray 的 TUN、开启 routeOnly 且 Android 10+ 时可用
- 添加支持路由中的出站可选别名，即支持分流到不同的服务器，请使用 Xray 的 TUN
- 添加启动器快捷方式以启动/停止服务
- 添加启用 IPv6 选项，区别 IPv6  优先
- 增加路由包名可视化选择
- 修复了一些问题
- 添加 KCP  MTU and TTI  https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/pull/5539
- 添加关闭本地代理或关闭 SOCKS5 中的 UDP 功能的选项  https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/pull/5548

- 添加真连接延迟测试并发数量选项
- 添加 Browser Dialer  https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/pull/5579
- https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.5.9
- 支持导入 SOCKS4/5 的分享链接 https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/commit/2a6edd98be59995216c81e70f6b13f02cc861252
- 改进速度通知，支持策略组等
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.1.8, local SOCKS username/password support was added. A dynamic local SOCKS port option was added. Process-based (package name) routing support was added, available only when using Xray TUN with routeOnly enabled on Android 10+. Outbound alias support in routing was added, enabling traffic splitting to different servers when using Xray TUN. A launcher shortcut to start/stop the service was added. An enable IPv6 option was added, distinct from IPv6 priority. Visual package name selection for routing was added. Some issues were fixed. KCP MTU and TTI support was added. An option to disable local proxy or disable UDP in SOCKS5 was added. Background subscription update was improved. Chain proxy was added. A concurrency option for real connection latency tests was added. Browser Dialer was added. The xray-core version was updated to v26.5.9. Import of SOCKS4/5 share links was supported. Speed notifications were improved, including support for strategy groups.

Repository: 2dust/v2rayNG
Release: 2.2.3
Tag: 2.2.3; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-06-02T10:46:40Z; created_at: 2026-06-02T10:39:35Z
Release notes:
### 警告：将在 2026.8.1 禁用跳过证书验证 "allowInsecure" ，请尽快改用证书指纹。到期后无法使用。
### 本次更新
- 将 target SDK 版本提升至 37 (Android 17)
- 路由中的出站支持策略组
- 添加分享日志 https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/pull/5682
- 移除 allowInsecure 首选项，该选项已被弃用，请使用证书指纹 pinnedPeerCertSha256
- [Xray-core v26.6.1](https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/tag/v26.6.1)
- 警告：将在 2026.8.1 禁用跳过证书验证 "allowInsecure" ，请尽快改用证书指纹。到期后无法使用。
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release 2.2.3, a warning states that skipping certificate verification "allowInsecure" will be disabled on 2026.8.1, and users should switch to certificate fingerprint as soon as possible. The target SDK version was raised to 37 (Android 17). Outbound in routing now supports strategy groups. Log sharing was added. The allowInsecure preference was removed as it is deprecated; users should use the certificate fingerprint pinnedPeerCertSha256. The xray-core version was updated to v26.6.1.

questions.query_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG releases, which release introduces WebDAV remote backup and a new tabbed main interface for grouping by subscription?

answer_support.answer_text: WebDAV remote backup, a new tabbed main interface for grouping by subscription

questions.query_text: Across the 2dust/v2rayNG releases, how does the TLS configuration change described in release 2.0.8 differ from the change described in release 2.2.2?

options.text: 2.0.8 warns that allowInsecure will be removed and advises using pinnedPeerCertSha256, while 2.2.2 actually removes the allowInsecure preference.
Both releases only update xray-core without TLS changes.

questions.expected_answer: 2.0.8 warns that allowInsecure will be removed and advises using pinnedPeerCertSha256, while 2.2.2 actually removes the allowInsecure preference.

answer_support.answer_text: xray core TLS will remove the allowInsecure configuration option; users should use pinnedPeerCertSha256 instead
The allowInsecure preference was removed as it is deprecated; users should use the certificate fingerprint pinnedPeerCertSha256

questions.query_text: In the 2dust/v2rayNG release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds chain proxy and a concurrency option for real connection latency tests, (2) a release that adds Browser Dialer, (3) a release that adds log sharing, (4) a release that adds pull-down subscription update and a locate selected server function.

answer_support.answer_text: Pull-down subscription update and a locate selected server function were added
Chain proxy was added. A concurrency option for real connection latency tests was added
